# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Access Roblox, Among Us, and Geometry Dash games instantly during school breaks. Sullivan games brings you the best unblocked gaming portal for students.

### Games
https://example.com/games
Discover hundreds of unblocked titles including Among Us game, Roblox adventures, and Geometry Dash challenges. Find your next favorite game to play today.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how Sullivan games became the trusted platform for school gaming. We provide safe, accessible entertainment featuring Geometry Dash and popular multiplayer hits.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have a game request or need help? Reach out to the Sullivan games team and let us know what you want to play next. We respond to all student inquiries fast.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Sullivan games

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Sullivan games

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Sullivan games

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
